help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Complete guide to platform modules
help.intro: Explore the available modules to understand all the features of the DHL shipment tracking platform.
help.contactInfo: Contact our support team for additional assistance or to clarify any questions.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Centralized overview of all shipping operations with real-time metrics and performance indicators.

actionRequired.title: Exceptions
actionRequired.description: Exception management center for issues requiring immediate attention, organized by severity and response time.
features: Open exceptions list by priority (P1, P2, P3)

shipments.title: Shipments
shipments.description: Complete management of all shipments with detailed tracking, documents, and event history.

customerRequests.title: Customer Requests
customerRequests.description: Inbox to manage service requests submitted by customers, including update requests and document uploads.
features: Filters by client and request type

slaManagement.title: SLA Management
slaManagement.description: Configuration of service level agreements (SLA) defining maximum allowed times per shipment status.

slaBreachReport.title: SLA Breach Report
slaBreachReport.description: Detailed report of all SLA violations that occurred, enabling cause and pattern analysis.

slaHeatmap.title: SLA Heatmap
slaHeatmap.description: Graphical visualization of SLA status for all active shipments, quickly identifying critical shipments.

scorecards.title: Client Scorecards
scorecards.description: Generation and visualization of monthly performance summaries for each client with detailed metrics.

notifications.title: Notification Settings
notifications.description: Customize alerts and notifications for proactive SLA monitoring.

clients.title: Clients
clients.description: Management of platform client registry, including specific settings for each account.

users.title: Users
users.description: Platform user administration with role-based access control.

exceptionRules.title: Exception Rules
exceptionRules.description: Configuration of automatic rules for exception detection based on time in each status.

auditLogs.title: Audit Logs
auditLogs.description: Historical record of all actions performed on the platform for traceability and compliance.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: General platform settings and system preferences.

customerHelp.title: Help Center
customerHelp.subtitle: Customer portal guide
customerHelp.intro: Welcome to the DHL Customer Portal. Here you can track your shipments, view your performance, and communicate with us.
customerHelp.contactInfo: Contact your DHL representative for additional assistance or to clarify questions about your shipments.

myShipments.title: My Shipments
myShipments.description: View and track all your shipments in real-time with detailed tracking information.
features: View full details of each shipment

scorecard.title: My Scorecard
scorecard.description: View your monthly performance summaries with SLA compliance metrics and delivery rates.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: View your account information and contact details registered on the platform.

documents.title: Documents
documents.description: Access documents associated with your shipments, such as proof of delivery, bills of lading, and invoices.
features: Types: POD, BL, Invoice, and others

requests.title: Requests
requests.description: Submit service requests related to your shipments, such as update requests or document uploads.

tour.tooltipDescription: Take an interactive tour to discover all the platform features

welcome.title: Welcome to DHL Backoffice!
welcome.content: Let's take a quick tour of the platform's main features. Follow the steps to discover everything.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.content: Here you have an overview of all operations: active shipments, exceptions, performance metrics, and scorecards.

exceptions.title: Exceptions
exceptions.content: This is the exception center. Here you see all issues that need immediate attention, organized by priority.

shipments.title: Shipment Management
shipments.content: Manage all shipments: create new ones, add tracking events, upload documents, and track progress.

help.title: Help Center
help.content: Click here whenever you need help. You'll find detailed descriptions of each module and its features.

settings.title: Customize Your Experience
settings.content: Use these controls to switch between light/dark theme and change the platform language.

welcome.title: Welcome to DHL Customer Portal!
welcome.content: This is your portal to track shipments and view performance. Let's explore the features.

shipments.title: My Shipments
shipments.content: View all your shipments in real-time. Click on any shipment to see details, documents, and event history.

scorecard.title: My Scorecard
scorecard.content: Track your monthly performance with SLA compliance metrics, delivery rates, and trend analysis.

profile.title: Your Profile
profile.content: View your account information and contact details registered on the platform.

help.title: Need Help?
help.content: Click here to see the complete portal guide with descriptions of all available features.
